import pytest
import gradebook.analytics


def test_clamp_percent_preserves_fraction_below_100():

import pytest
import gradebook.analytics


def test_clamp_percent_preserves_fraction_below_100():
    assert gradebook.analytics.clamp_percent(99.5) == 99.5
winning_test.targeted_behavior: A fractional percentage between 99 and 100 must remain unchanged; only values strictly above 100 are clamped.
